light.--sf-color-text:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4 - 0), 0.35) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-text--secondary:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.15, calc(l - 0.25 - 0), 0.45) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.55, calc(l + 0.1 + 0), 0.90) c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-heading:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4 - 0), 0.35) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-border:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.35), 0.95) 0.005 h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.25, calc(l - 0.3),  0.55) 0.005 h)
      )
light.--sf-color-border--subtle:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.75, calc(l + 0.4),  0.97) 0.005 h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.20, calc(l - 0.38), 0.45) 0.005 h)
      )
light.--sf-color-border--strong:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.55, calc(l + 0.1),  0.85) 0.02  h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.38, calc(l - 0.1),  0.65) 0.02  h)
      )
light.--sf-color-link:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.22 235) clamp(0, min(l - 0.07, 0.48), 1) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.22 235) clamp(0.68, l, 1) c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-selection-bg:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.22 235) l c h / 0.28),
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.22 235) clamp(0.62, calc(0.93 - l * 0.4), 0.78) c h / 0.55)
      )
light.--sf-color-success-strong:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.16 145) calc(l - 0.15) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.16 145)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-warning-strong:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.75 0.17 80) calc(l - 0.25) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.75 0.17 80)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.05), 1) c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-error-strong:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.2 25) calc(l - 0.1) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.5 0.2 25)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-info-strong:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.48 0.18 235) calc(l - 0.1) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.48 0.18 235)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
      )
light.--sf-color-danger-strong:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.48 0.22 12) calc(l - 0.1) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.48 0.22 12)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
      )
light.--sf-shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7))
light.--sf-shadow-s:
0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7)),
                         0 2px 6px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17), 0.7))
light.--sf-shadow-m:
0 1px 3px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7)),
                         0 4px 12px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 2), 0.7))
light.--sf-shadow-l:
0 2px 4px 0   oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7)),
                         0 8px 24px 0  oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 3), 0.7)),
                         0 16px 48px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 0 * 0.17) * 2), 0.7))

dark.--sf-color-text: oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)
dark.--sf-color-text--secondary: oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) clamp(0.55, calc(l + 0.1 + 0), 0.90) c h)
dark.--sf-color-heading: oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)
dark.--sf-color-link: oklch(from oklch(0.7 0.198 235) clamp(0.68, l, 1) c h)
dark.--sf-color-success-strong: oklch(from oklch(0.7 0.144 145) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
dark.--sf-color-warning-strong: oklch(from oklch(0.65 0.153 80) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.05), 1) c h)
dark.--sf-color-error-strong: oklch(from oklch(0.7 0.18 25)   clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
dark.--sf-color-info-strong: oklch(from oklch(0.71 0.162 235)    clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
dark.--sf-color-danger-strong: oklch(from oklch(0.71 0.198 12)  clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h)
dark.--sf-shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7))
dark.--sf-shadow-s:
0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7)),
                         0 2px 6px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17), 0.7))
dark.--sf-shadow-m:
0 1px 3px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7)),
                         0 4px 12px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 2), 0.7))
dark.--sf-shadow-l:
0 2px 4px 0   oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 0.5), 0.7)),
                         0 8px 24px 0  oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 3), 0.7)),
                         0 16px 48px 0 oklch(from oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) 0.15 c h) l c h / clamp(0, calc(calc(0.08 + 1 * 0.17) * 2), 0.7))
